name: add-retry-logic-to-sandbox-provisioning
description: Implement exponential backoff retry logic for sandbox VM provisioning failures. Currently a transient AWS API error causes the entire task to fail.
author: drella

name: fix-transcript-encoding-for-unicode
description: Fix broken Unicode characters in transcript JSONL output when tool results contain emoji or CJK text.
author: drella

name: migrate-config-to-yaml-v2
description: Migrate orchestrator configuration from the legacy TOML format to YAML v2 schema with validation and default value support.
author: drella

name: refactor-daemon-pr-polling
description: Refactor the daemon's GitHub PR polling loop to use GraphQL batch queries instead of individual REST calls, reducing API rate limit consumption.
author: drella

name: add-caddy-health-endpoint
description: Add a /health endpoint to the Caddyfile that returns 200 OK for load balancer health checks.
author: drella

name: improve-mcp-error-messages
description: Improve error messages returned by MCP tool handlers to include actionable context (file paths, git refs) instead of raw Go error strings.
author: drella

name: update-go-dependencies-may
description: Monthly dependency update: bump Go modules to latest patch versions, run tests, fix any breakage.
author: drella

name: fix-sandbox-cleanup-race
description: Fix race condition where sandbox destroy could run before transcript flush completed, losing the last few lines of output.
author: drella

name: add-task-description-to-state
description: Persist the task description field in state.json so the dashboard can display it without parsing the transcript.
author: drella
